caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair is recorded in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bowtie, gold suspenders, glasses, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in profile, speaking into a black microphone on a stand. In the background, a poster with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed shield logo are visible. Each frame features a red and white logo in the bottom left corner that reads "#REALTALK PODCAST" and text in the bottom right corner that reads "REAL TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position and outfit, shifting slightly as he speaks and looks toward the microphone. The camera remains static, capturing his facial expressions and slight head movements as he continues his conversation.
